summary: Comprehensive testing of Salon Management App after dark 'Onyx & Gold' theme overhaul and NavConfigurator feature. All core features verified working: Public website with dark theme, BookingModal with accordion-style services and animated price counter, Admin panel with dark sidebar, NavConfigurator for customizable navigation. Backend API tests: 15/15 passed.

minor.issue: Returns 404 Not Found - may be deprecated endpoint

issues: 'I nostri lavori' tab has .slice(0, 16) limit - shows max 16 photos. User requested 'all photos without limit'. 'Il salone' tab has no limit.
One image appears broken/blank in the gallery (5th position top-right corner in masonry layout) - likely an external image loading issue

passed_tests: BACKEND: Public website API returns salon config (BRUNO MELITO HAIR)
BACKEND: Public services API returns 25+ services with categories
BACKEND: Public operators API returns operators list
BACKEND: Public promotions API returns promotions list
BACKEND: Admin login successful with admin@brunomelito.it
BACKEND: Protected endpoint correctly requires authentication (403)
BACKEND: Nav config GET/PUT endpoints work correctly with persistence
BACKEND: Appointments, clients, services, operators APIs all respond 200
BACKEND: Dashboard stats API returns today's appointments and revenue
FRONTEND: Public site loads with dark theme (body bg: rgb(11, 17, 32) = #0B1120)
FRONTEND: Gold accent (#D4AF37) visible on branding and buttons
FRONTEND: Navbar with Chi siamo, Galleria, Recensioni, Contatti links
FRONTEND: Hero section renders with 'La tua bellezza merita il meglio'
FRONTEND: 'Prenota ora' button opens BookingModal
FRONTEND: BookingModal has accordion-style service categories (11 categories: Taglio, Piega, Styling, Altro, Trattamento, Colore, Permanente, Stiratura, Abbonamento, Modellanti, Promozioni)
FRONTEND: Service selection shows animated price counter on 'Scegli data e ora' button (€10)
FRONTEND: BookingModal step navigation works (Step 1→2→3 and back)
FRONTEND: Step 2 shows date picker and time slots grid
FRONTEND: Step 3 shows client form with name, phone, notes and summary
FRONTEND: Admin login redirects to /planning
FRONTEND: Admin sidebar has dark theme (rgb(11, 17, 32))
FRONTEND: Admin sidebar shows nav items: Planning, Dashboard, Agenda, Report Incassi, Impostazioni
FRONTEND: 'Personalizza' button visible at bottom of sidebar
FRONTEND: NavConfigurator opens with two columns: Barra Laterale and Dashboard
FRONTEND: NavConfigurator allows drag-to-reorder and move items between columns
FRONTEND: NavConfigurator has Save button and Reset defaults option
FRONTEND: Planning page shows calendar view with operators (BRUNO, MBHS)
FRONTEND: '+Nuovo' button opens appointment dialog
FRONTEND: New appointment dialog has accordion-style service categories (same as BookingModal)
FRONTEND: Gallery section renders with dark theme and gold accents
FRONTEND: Gallery tabs (I nostri lavori / Il salone) work correctly
action_items: MINOR: Consider removing the .slice(0, 16) limit in GallerySection.jsx line 33 if user wants all photos shown in 'I nostri lavori' tab
MINOR: Fix broken image in gallery (5th position) - likely external image URL issue
critical_code_review_comments: Dark theme CSS variables properly defined in index.css (:root with --bg-deep, --bg-card, --gold, etc.)
NavConfigurator properly saves config to backend via PUT /api/nav-config and localStorage
BookingModal accordion implementation uses clean category grouping with expand/collapse
Animated price counter uses CSS animation 'popIn' on price badge
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
No JavaScript errors detected in console during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dark 'Onyx & Gold' theme fully applied and working. BookingModal has accordion-style services. NavConfigurator allows customizing sidebar/dashboard layout. Admin redirects to /planning after login. Gallery has 16-photo limit for 'lavori' tab but no limit for 'salone' tab. All core APIs working. The /api/appointments/pending-bookings endpoint returns 404 - this may be intentional or deprecated.
